response.step_by_step_log: The video was identified as an ending screen for the "hololive English 4th Concert - Serendipity" broadcast. The music playing is the song "Connect the World" by Hololive English. I used the search tool to find the lyrics for the song and confirmed the details. The video is a single continuous scene from start to finish.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional message for the "hololive English 4th Concert - Serendipity", showing a concert-themed background and ending the sneak peek portion of the broadcast. The theme song "Connect the World" by hololive English plays throughout the clip.

scenes.description: A still image promoting the Hololive English 4th Concert - Serendipity. The video serves as a broadcast ending message. The concert theme song, "Connect the World", plays throughout.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
We're ready to greet the world!
We're voyaging forward with courage
To run toward a brand-new start
Let's go live!
Bridging the distance across the sea endlessly
Cheerfully meeting heart to heart!

Waking from a dream, swept up into a stream
I make a wish and wait for my cue-
How will we connect in this
New frontier we're journeying through?
Thriving in a scene where no one's ever been
With vibrant colors bursting like stars-
Radiant and warm; charged with energy
That's carried us this far

Each new debut brings a miracle to life
Surely
We've gotta take that chance
We're running nonstop; straight to the top
That's right!

We're ready to change the game
A shimmering showcase
Creating a new place where we can shine!
Day by day, sparkling stories will intertwine
Get ready to cross the waves
We're voyaging forward with courage
To run toward a brand-new stage
Let's go live!
Bridging the distance across the sea endlessly
Follow me and we'll turn the page!

Breaking through the doubt, we know
We'll figure out a way to clear each towering trial;
Sharing all our hopes,
We can conquer any challenge with a smile!
We'll link our hearts as we search across the globe
Knowing
No matter where we are, no matter how far
We can be stars
Let's go!

I wanna chase a wish unwaveringly,
Playing out a grand story
Share the futures that we can see
Making them reality!
Take my hand and reach for the screen
All we need are glittering dreams
Our hearts and souls,
All fulfilled in the world we build!

We're ready to seize the day
Traversing the pathways,
Discovering highways to everywhere!
Step by step, gathering stories that we can share!
Get ready to lead the way
With each generation, a shining sensation;
A dream unfurls-
Let's make friends,
Making a moment of history joyfully!
Follow me; we'll connect the world!

They'll hear our song ringing out over hills and oceans
Our legend grows and continues!
We'll carry on starting now; setting hearts in motion-
Connecting all of the world!,reference_lyrics_og:

response.thoughts:
**Analyzing the Hololive English Concert Video**

Okay, so the task is to identify the music in this concert video, and, if possible, get the lyrics. From the instructions, I'm expecting this to be fairly straightforward.

First, I see that the video itself is a recording of a screen during a Hololive English concert. The screen displays "hololive English 4th Concert - Serendipity" and mentions that the sneak peek has ended. The main thing here is the music. I need to identify it. I note the on-screen text isn't actually part of the concert footage - it's superimposed. It's a song being performed by Hololive English members.

I'm listening closely, trying to pick out the melody. Hmm... it sounds like "Connect the World". I'll quickly confirm that with a search.

The video is a single, continuous scene. No edits or cuts to worry about, it's consistent from start to finish (00:00 to 02:24).

Now to confirm the song. A quick search with "Connect the World hololive English lyrics" should do the trick.

With the identification done, I'll organize my findings. The song is "Connect the World" by Hololive English, as performed by Hololive English. The language is English.

Finally, I'll compile everything into a JSON format. I’ve identified the video as a recording of a Hololive English concert sneak peek, with "Connect the World" playing in the background. The video encompasses a single scene from 00:00 to 02:24. The overall summary is this video is a post-concert message for the "hololive English 4th Concert - Serendipity", playing the concert theme song "Connect the World". Now to run the search.



**Ready to Encode: "Connect the World" JSON**

Okay, the "Connect the World" lyrics are in. That's a good find; Hololive English, both the performer and the artist, nailed that down. English, as expected. The metadata for the JSON is all there – song title, artist, performer, language. Seems straightforward.

Let's quickly verify… yep, scene timecode 00:00 to 02:24, all good. The core components for the JSON structure are ready to be integrated into the broader project data structure. Time to get this into the system!
